Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Understand the Goal The user wants me to analyze a process event log identify recurring activities within the same case that have different contextual meanings rename them to reflect these differences present the revised log and justify the naming choices

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Analyze the Event Log Lets look at each case and identify recurring activities Case C001 Verify Documents appears twice Case C002 Call Customer appears twice Case C003 Verify Documents appears twice

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Summary of Recurring Activities Verify Documents Appears twice in C001 and C003 First time Initial check Second time Re-checking after a change Call Customer Appears twice in C002 First time Initial outbound call Second time Follow-up call

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Correction on C003 C003 only has Call Customer once So Call Customer appears twice only in C002

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Determine Contextual Meanings New Names Verify Documents First occurrence Initial Document Verification Second occurrence Document Re-verification Call Customer First occurrence Call Customer for Information Second occurrence Call Customer for Confirmation

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: Draft the Revised Event Log Need to replace Verify Documents and Call Customer in the markdown table based on their order context Refine names for consistency across cases

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Justify the Naming Choices Explain why Verify Documents was split first instance standard initial check second instance re-check after intervening event Rename to Initial Document Verification and Document Re-verification

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Self-Correction Review during drafting Did I miss any recurring activities C001 Verify x2 C002 Call x2 C003 Verify x2 No other activities repeat

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Final Polish Grouping Call Customer first in flow Call Customer for Information Action all cases share process role to unblock second Call Customer for Confirmation
